Sample_Description: The original factory configuration previously restored by the Restore Factory Defaults button. Diameter 3 inches, pitch 1.25 inches, two blades.

Sample_Description_i18n.en: The original factory configuration previously restored by the Restore Factory Defaults button. Diameter 3 inches, pitch 1.25 inches, two blades.
Sample_Description_i18n.pt-BR: Configuração original anteriormente aplicada pelo botão Restaurar padrões. Diâmetro de 3 polegadas, passo de 1,25 polegada e duas pás.
Sample_Description_i18n.es: Configuración original antes aplicada por Restaurar valores. Diámetro de 3 pulgadas, paso de 1,25 pulgadas y dos palas.
Sample_Description_i18n.fr: Configuration d’origine auparavant appliquée par Restaurer les valeurs. Diamètre de 3 pouces, pas de 1,25 pouce et deux pales.
Sample_Description_i18n.de: Ursprüngliche Konfiguration, die zuvor über Werkseinstellungen wiederherstellen geladen wurde. 3 Zoll Durchmesser, 1,25 Zoll Steigung, zwei Blätter.
Sample_Description_i18n.ru: Исходная конфигурация, ранее загружавшаяся кнопкой восстановления. Диаметр 3 дюйма, шаг 1,25 дюйма, две лопасти.

Source.Adaptation_Notes: Converted from the former Restore Factory Defaults action into a built-in configuration. Release 1.1 uses the validated split-trailing-edge workflow and 0.1 mm Boundary Fill diameter overlap.
